title: Parser infinite loop in handleError with external scanner tokens
description: When parsing CSS/HTML inputs that require external scanner tokens (descendant_op, implicit_end_tag), the parser enters an infinite loop in handleError/doAllPotentialReductions. Simple inputs that avoid external scanner tokens parse fine. This blocks all non-trivial integration tests for CSS and HTML grammars. Root cause is likely in the parser error recovery loop interaction with external scanner state restoration.
